name: Xyz Bento
name_jp: エクシーズ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>弁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>べん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>当</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster(s) your opponent controls is destroyed by battle or sent to the GY: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 monster from your opponent's GY to that monster as material. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster on the field Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; change its battle position.
eff: If a monster(s) your opponent controls is destroyed by battle or sent to the GY: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 monster from your opponent's GY to that monster as material. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster on the field Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; change its battle position.

action: Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
